step_by_step_thinking: \boxed{A} Based on the available medical evidence, nintedanib holds promise for lung disease associated with systemic sclerosis because it has been specifically approved by the FDA for systemic sclerosis-associated interstitial lung disease (SSc-ILD) following clinical trials showing a significant slowing of the decline in pulmonary function tests, especially forced vital capacity (FVC). Multiple authoritative sources confirm its role in delaying disease progression and improving patient outcomes in SSc-ILD, supported by guideline recommendations from major societies such as ATS, ERS, JRS, and ALAT. raw_response: \boxed{A} Based on the available medical evidence, nintedanib holds promise for lung disease associated with systemic sclerosis because it has been specifically approved by the FDA for systemic sclerosis-associated interstitial lung disease (SSc-ILD) following clinical trials showing a significant slowing of the decline in pulmonary function tests, especially forced vital capacity (FVC). Multiple authoritative sources confirm its role in delaying disease progression and improving patient outcomes in SSc-ILD, supported by guideline recommendations from major societies such as ATS, ERS, JRS, and ALAT. Therefore, the correct answer is \boxed{A}.
